description: Electroweak gauge-boson masses m_W and m_Z derived parameter-free from three inputs all closed in the wider Emergence corpus: (i) v_EW = 246.2186 GeV from the HBR identity plus the four-path |g| consensus (P1 hbr-ew-scale-repro, EXACT 6e-6); (ii) sin^2 theta_W = 0.23122 from the loop-class identity beta_pi - (1-gamma)*pi/4 (Lemma L6 of the causal-wave landings, P2, EXACT 0.0015%); (iii) alpha_EM(M_Z) = 1/127.951 from PDG. Standard-Model tree relations m_W = sqrt(4 pi alpha_EM / sin^2 theta_W) * v_EW / 2 and m_Z = m_W / sqrt(1 - sin^2 theta_W) feed all three closed inputs forward and yield EXACT-tier match against PDG 2024 (m_W residual 0.168%, m_Z residual 0.351%). The bundled numerics correspond to the canonical-regime ewsb_via_cw_sin2tw method documented in outputs_sm_particle_spectrum/sm_particle_spectrum_bundle.json.
method: ewsb_via_cw_sin2tw: SM-tree EWSB fed by CW-derived sin^2 theta_W and the HBR-derived v_EW

branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Electroweak / vacuum-anchor QFT observable; vacuum-projection side

inputs.v_EW_source: P1 hbr-ew-scale-repro: HBR identity (2/pi) M_Pl exp(-4 pi eta_S) plus four-path |g| consensus, EXACT 6e-6 against PDG 246.22
inputs.sin2_theta_W_source: P2 causal-wave-landings L6: beta_pi - (1-gamma)*pi/4 EXACT 0.0015% against PDG

m_W_closure.name: W-boson mass m_W
m_W_closure.structural_identity: m_W = sqrt(4 pi alpha_EM / sin^2 theta_W) * v_EW / 2
from_axioms: A3 reduction system R (sin^2 theta_W is loop-class L6)

cross_check.framing: The mass ratio m_Z/m_W is fully determined by sin^2 theta_W alone. The closed-form prediction (1/sqrt(1 - sin^2 theta_W) = 1.14039) sits within 0.534% of the directly-measured mass ratio 91.188/80.369 = 1.13434, providing an independent cross-check that the L6 sin^2 theta_W closure is the source of both EW-boson-mass closures.

summary.framing: Both m_W and m_Z close EXACT against PDG 2024 from three already-closed parameter-free inputs (v_EW, sin^2 theta_W, alpha_EM). The closure is downstream of the L6 sin^2 theta_W loop-class identity and the P1 HBR v_EW closure; no new physics input is introduced.
